title: FerreMcDurabilityOverlay
description: This Pack shows the durability of armour.
body:
# 🛡️ FerreMcDurabilityOverlay – Armor Durability Visualizer

****Designed with PvP combat in mind, this resource pack provides a clear visual representation of your armor's durability, helping you make informed decisions during intense battles.****
## 🔧 Features:
__Dynamic Armor Textures: Armor textures change color based on durability levels:__

- 🟩 ****Green (80%–100%): Slightly worn****

- 🟨 ****Yellow (60%–79%): Moderately damaged****

- 🟥 ****Red (40%–59%): Significantly damaged****

- 🟥 ****Dark Red (20%–39%): Critical condition****

- 🟪 ****Purple (0%–19%): Broken****
- ****PvP Focused: Ideal for PvP scenarios, providing immediate visual cues to assess armor status during combat.****
- ****Compatibility: Designed for use with [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) on Fabric or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home).****
- ****Supported Armor Types: Applicable to Diamond and Netherite armor sets.****
##   ⚠️ Installation Requirements:

- ****For Fabric Users: Install the [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod.****

- ****For Optifine Users: Install [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) and ensure it's properly configured.****
                               
![Stages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6702f860d62f1dcbcd717354fd2747b4f119b875.png)
# ⚠️ Notice: 
Some servers may restrict durability-based visual resource packs. Use only where allowed. ****I am not responsible for any actions taken by servers.****
